title: Qibrowth #6914
definition:
Kibroth-hattaavah = "graves of lust"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness 3 campsites away from Sinai
    near the gulf of Akabah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kibroth-hattaavah = "graves of lust"

 1) a station of Israel in the wilderness 3 campsites away from Sinai
    near the gulf of Akabah

    NASB:  the graves of desire, a place in the desert
